titleStmt.title: SII 17.705: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 705. (A.R. No. 648 of 1904.) RĀMAGIRI, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the Bhairava shrine in the Vālīśvara temple.

This inscription records the gift of land as tirunāmattukkāṇi-ubaiyam, made free of the taxes poṉvari, kaḍamai, antarāyam, etc., by the inhabitants (ūravar) of Arikaṇḍapuram for services during the festivals in the month of Vaigāśi, in the temple of Tirukkārikarai-uḍaiyār.
Among the boundaries of the gift land, the record mentions the hamlet Kāḷayakaṇḍachchēri.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . yātavarāyaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 6 vatu tirukkārikarai Uṭaiyārkku vaikācit tirunāḷukku Arikaṇṭapurattūrava
rom Ittirunāḷ Aḻivukku pūvuṭaiyāṉ kuḻipaḷḷattukku meṟku kacciyekampar tiruttu Uṭpaṭa kāḷayakaṇṭacceri Ellaikku
vaṭakkum vaṭapārkellai māvukku vaṭakku paḷḷippaṭṭi māvil Ellai Uṟavum Iv vellai Uṭpaṭṭa nilam kuṭi ṉiṅkiṉa nilam tiruṉāmattu
kkāṇi Upaiyamāka poṉvari kaṭamai pala Antarāya maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Upātikaḷu m Iṟai kaḻittu kuṭinīṅkiṉa nilamāka viṭṭom
Arikaṇṭapurattu Ūravarom Itukku Ilaṅkaṇam coṉṉavaṉ keṅkaiRead keṅkai.karaiyil kurāṟ ppacuvai koṉṟa piramatti paṭuvār .
Digital edition of SII 17.705 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
